task_completion.description: Create partition walls to divide the space into at least four functional rooms named 'Control Room', 'Green Room', 'Makeup', and 'Studio Floor'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Sweet Home 3D 2D plan view, look for drawn partition walls and text labels for the four specific rooms: 'Control Room', 'Green Room', 'Makeup', and 'Studio Floor'.

task_completion.description: Furnish the Studio Floor with an anchor desk setup (at least one desk and two chairs) and studio grid lighting (at least four fixtures).
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 2D plan, 3D view, or furniture list, verify that the 'Studio Floor' area contains at least 1 desk, 2 chairs, and 4 lighting fixtures.

task_completion.description: Furnish the Production Control Room with a master control console (at least three desks) and technical equipment (at least six screens).
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 2D plan, 3D view, or furniture list, verify that the 'Control Room' contains at least 3 desks and 6 screens/monitors.

task_completion.description: Ensure at least four monitors in the Control Room are wall-mounted at an elevation of 80 cm or higher.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 3D view, look for at least 4 screens placed on the walls of the Control Room. Alternatively, check the furniture list panel for screens with an 'Elevation' value of 80 cm or greater.

task_completion.description: Furnish the Talent Prep Areas (Green Room and/or Makeup) with at least one sofa and one sink.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 2D plan, 3D view, or furniture list, verify the presence of at least 1 sofa and 1 sink located within the 'Green Room' or 'Makeup' rooms.

task_completion.description: Use a minimum of 40 items from the built-in catalog across the facility and save the project.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the furniture list panel to estimate if there are at least 40 items listed. Check the application window title or file menu to ensure the project is saved (e.g., no asterisk next to the filename indicating unsaved changes, or a visible save action).

integrity.description: The agent used the Sweet Home 3D graphical user interface to design the layout.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Sweet Home 3D application open with the agent actively using the mouse/cursor to draw walls, drag furniture from the catalog, and edit properties, rather than just running a terminal script.

integrity.description: The agent worked on the correct starter file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Sweet Home 3D window title should display 'tv_studio_starter.sh3d' (or a saved derivative of it), confirming the agent didn't open a pre-completed example file.

integrity.description: The design was built progressively rather than loaded all at once.
integrity.visual_evidence: Across multiple screenshots, there should be a clear progression of walls being drawn, rooms being named, and furniture being placed one by one or in small groups.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires modifying 'tv_studio_starter.sh3d' in Sweet Home 3D. The VLM should verify 5 main criteria: 1) Four specific rooms created ('Control Room', 'Green Room', 'Makeup', 'Studio Floor'), 2) Studio Floor has 1+ desk, 2+ chairs, 4+ lights, 3) Control Room has 3+ desks, 6+ screens, 4) Control Room has 4+ monitors wall-mounted at >= 80cm elevation, 5) Talent Prep areas have 1+ sofa and 1+ sink. The total furniture count must be >= 40 items. Maximum score is 100. Pass threshold is 70.
